expiringSoon.title: Subscription Expiring Soon
expiringSoon.message: Your subscription expires on {date}. Renew now to avoid service interruption.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Subscription
upgrade.description: Choose a plan to upgrade to

cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?

bottomBar.title: Subscription inactive
bottomBar.expiredHint: Your plan has ended or access is paused. Renew to use all features again.
bottomBar.periodMissing: Subscription period end date is missing. Please contact support.
bottomBar.noSubscriptionHint: No active subscription. Choose a plan to continue.
bottomBar.modalDescription: Select a billing cycle and pay securely to restore access.
bottomBar.outletUserHint: Only the shop owner (Merchant) can complete payment. Ask them to renew, or open Subscription for details.

flow.payOnlineHint: Pick a plan and billing cycle — you’ll complete payment on a secure page.
flow.bankTransferHint: Already paid? Send us the transaction ID so we can extend your subscription.
flow.urgentLead: Choose how you want to continue:
flow.healthyHint: You can change plan or record a transfer anytime from here.
flow.payOnlineSubline: Uses your current plan and billing period. Final price is confirmed on Lemon Squeezy.

banner.expiredMessage: Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue using the service.
banner.expiresOn: Your subscription expires on {date}. Consider renewing to avoid service interruption.

errors.title: Subscription Error
errors.paused: Your subscription is paused. Some features may be limited.
errors.pausedAction: Resume your subscription to access all features.
errors.expired: Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue.
errors.expiredAction: Choose a new plan to continue using the service.
errors.cancelledAction: Contact support to reactivate your subscription or choose a new plan.
errors.pastDue: Payment is past due. Please update your payment method.
errors.pastDueAction: Update your payment information to avoid service interruption.
errors.merchantAccount: Your merchant account is {status}. Please contact support.
errors.merchantAccountAction: Contact support to resolve account issues.

page.noSubscriptionBody: You don't have an active subscription.
page.subtitle: Manage your subscription and billing
page.historyModalDescription: Past subscription plans and payment transactions.
page.alertExpiredBody: Your subscription expired on {date}. Please renew to continue using the service.
page.alertExpiringBody: Your subscription expires on {date}. Consider renewing to avoid service interruption.
page.historyDescription: View your past subscription plans and billing history
page.upgradeModalDescription: Choose a plan that better fits your business needs.
page.upgradeModalBody: You will be redirected to our plan selection page where you can compare plans and upgrade.
page.renewModalDescription: Pay online with Lemon Squeezy, or submit proof if you paid by bank transfer.
page.renewOnlineSectionHint: Choose billing cycle. Amount is an estimate — checkout shows the final total.
page.renewPriceUnknown: Select a billing cycle to see an estimate, or continue — Lemon Squeezy will show the exact amount.
page.checkoutSuccessBody: Thank you. Your subscription may take a moment to update — use Refresh if needed.
page.checkoutCancelBody: No charge was made. You can try again when you’re ready.
page.transferHint: Current backend flow uses transaction ID proof for transfers.
page.billingSettingsDescription: Manage your billing preferences and payment methods.
page.billingSettingsBody: Billing settings functionality will be available soon. For now, please contact support for billing changes.
page.toastMissingTxBody: Please enter your bank transaction ID.

choosePlanDialog.title: Choose Your Plan
choosePlanDialog.description: Compare plans and pick a billing cycle. You will complete payment on a secure page.
choosePlanDialog.loadError: Could not load plans. Check your connection and try again.
choosePlanDialog.empty: No plans are available right now.
choosePlanDialog.purchaseDescription: You will be redirected to our payment provider to pay securely.
choosePlanDialog.priceNote: Lemon Squeezy shows taxes and the final charge before you pay.
choosePlanDialog.checkoutErrorBody: Could not start payment. Check plan setup (Lemon Squeezy variant) or try again.
choosePlanDialog.termsHint: By continuing, you agree to the terms of service and billing policy.
